ePBS: Remove FCU shortcut to enable payload reorgs within 32 blocks

EIP-4444: one year; weak subjectivity: 18 days; blob expiry: 18 days

organizational.highlight: SFI definition PR to clarify when EIPs move to Scheduled for Inclusion
